positive: A stylized, geometric illustration of a majestic nocturnal owl perched on a stylized branch. The design features Art Deco elements mixed with modern minimalist aesthetics. The color palette should use deep indigo, muted teal, distressed gold, and creamy off-white. The composition must be highly symmetrical, featuring clean, bold silhouettes and strong negative space around the main subject. Use linework and hatching techniques, giving it a luxurious, sophisticated emblem feel. Suitable for repeating pattern tile design, presented against a solid background. High contrast, ultra-detail, vector quality, print-ready, stylized graphic art.
